calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To The California Public Records Act
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Abenicio Cisneros, Esq. 760-310-5244 for Petitioner.
Michael Vartain, Esq. 415-391-1155 for Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares it's views. Petitioner raises 3 points. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ANNA HERRMANN's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To The California Public Records Act.

Plaintiff Anna von Herrmann's motion for attorney's fees and costs is denied. Ms. von Herrmann is not the prevailing party in this CRPA case. At no time did Hastings refuse to provide any documents requested by Ms. von Herrmann nor did Ms. von Herrmann make any contact with Hastings prior to her filing this lawsuit to say that she had been improperly denied any of the records she requested. The court credits the evidence submitted by Hastings that the long delay in providing the documents was due to the responsible employee leaving its employment and the absence of any reminder by Ms. von Herrmann. Given the breadth of the request which called for ten categories of documents for 15 different school years, Hastings' satisfaction of the request within two months after it was notified of this lawsuit shows that Hastings would have provided the documents in the absence of this lawsuit. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed in Open court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
